nasb.text: Woe to those who rise early in the morning that they may pursue strong drink, Who stay up late in the evening that wine may inflame them!

esv.text: Woe to those who rise early in the morning, that they may run after strong drink, who tarry late into the evening as wine inflames them!

cnv.text: 那些清早起來，追求濃酒， 留連到晚上，以致因酒發燒的人，有禍了！

ccb.text: 那些从清早到深夜贪杯好酒， 喝到酩酊大醉的人有祸了！

csbs.text: 祸哉！那些清早起来追寻烈酒、 流连到深夜为酒狂热的人！
